title: Space Invaders
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1978 arcade Space Invaders design; genre evidence from live Nintendo eShop Space Invaders Invincible Collection Switch listing (includes classic Space Invaders among TAITO titles), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Descending formations and a single base laser force timing, cover destruction, and score risk.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One fixed shooter grammar escalates solely via formation speed and density, not kit unlocks.
exemplar_rationale: Arcade golden-age fixed-kit execution: wave pressure without progression systems.

evidence.claim: Nintendo eShop product genres field listed: Action; Shooting.
